title: SCP-3000, Anatashesha
description: A huge anomalous eel-like monster that roams in the deep ocean
body:
Anatashesha adds a terrifying new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-3000, also known as Anatashesha.


SCP-3000 can be first spotted leaping from the water in deep ocean biomes before later appearing naturally. Towering in size and incredibly dangerous, SCP-3000 emits a constant Nausea effect to players nearby. SCP-3000 is almost impossible to kill, it is capable of destroying boats and even breaking blocks in its path. A single hit can be fatal, making it one of the most dangerous aquatic threats in existence. While rare, an encounter with SCP-3000 is rarely survived if it see's you as it's prey.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-3000 spawn?

SCP-3000 can rarely spawn in deep coean. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-3000

► How can I enable SCP-3000 to spawn instantly?

SCP-3000 only spawns after you saw him jumping out of the water. If you set the gamerule "enableAnatasheshaSpawn" to true, SCP-3000 will spawn without seeing him before.

► How can I disable SCP-3000 to break blocks or boats?

SCP-3000 breaks blocks and boats if being aggressive. It can be disabled if you set the gamerule "mobGriefing" to false.

</details>



![SCP-3000](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3625ede0022aa2365c499f156c75bcff2279a8ec.png)

SCP-3000 first reveals itself when seen leaping from the ocean’s surface. If a player is close during this event, a thunderstorm will begin. It then spawns in deep ocean biomes, towering in size, nearly invincible due to its sheer mass, Anatashesha deals enough damage to swallow a player whole in a single strike. It moves with high speed, destroying nearby boats and shattering blocks in its path. Any player who ventures too close is afflicted with a constant Nausea effect, a disorienting influence radiating from SCP-3000 itself.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
